_publications._publicationTitle: Electrical stimulation of Schwann cells on electrospun hyaluronic acid carbon nanotube fibers.

_contextSnippet: Highest NGF release was seen following 100 mV/mm for WT SC...WT SC at 48 hours, 100 mV/mm is significantly higher than all other conditions
details: Highest NGF release was seen following 100 mV/mm for WT SC, with WT SC at 48 hours, 100 mV/mm significantly higher than all other conditions
